evals.prompt: My build cache keeps missing even though I haven't changed anything — turbo always rebuilds everything from scratch
evals.expected: Identifies common cache miss causes: missing outputs paths in turbo.json, env vars not listed in globalEnv/task env, incorrect inputs. Provides corrected turbo.json with proper outputs and env configuration.

evals.prompt: How do I set up my CI pipeline to only build the packages that actually changed in this pull request?
evals.expected: Explains --affected flag with turbo run build --affected, how Turborepo detects changes via git diff, and correct CI YAML using turbo run build --affected

evals.prompt: I have 3 apps (web, admin, api) that all share a UI package — how do I configure turbo.json so the UI package always builds before the apps?
evals.expected: Shows turbo.json with build task using dependsOn: ['^build'], explains ^ prefix means 'wait for dependencies in package.json', shows workspace dependency declarations
